codeReview.summary: The feature largely implements the requested protocol and cache indexes, but the Repository Protocol is incomplete relative to the current AppState public API and the CacheManager remove/update logic leaves stale by-name entries when duplicate names exist.

issues.description: The Repository Protocol does not cover all current AppState data operations as required. The mission requires a protocol matching the current AppState public API exactly so AppState can later delegate all operations through it, but this interface is only a subset of that API surface.

invalidate_character('remove'/'update') only removes char_by_name entries when the map value is the same object being mutated. After rebuild(), duplicate lowercase names are last-writer-wins, so removing or renaming that winning character leaves no mapping for an older duplicate still present in the project. The cache becomes stale until a full rebuild, violating the requirement that indexes stay consistent after add/remove/update sequences.

invalidate_location('remove'/'update') has the same stale-index bug as characters: when duplicate lowercase names exist, removing or renaming the current winner deletes the key instead of falling back to the remaining duplicate. Incremental cache state diverges from rebuild() output.
The test suite checks duplicate-name rebuild semantics but does not cover duplicate-name incremental removal/update cases, so the stale by-name regression above would pass unnoticed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The transcript shows repeated failed attempts to use non-existent Create/Edit-style tools before falling back to working tools, but the available-tool guidance for this mission does not clearly reflect the actual tool surface in this environment. This caused avoidable time spent on tooling confusion.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for b7676957-3427-49b5-9d1e-6f3abfe8bc25 contains multiple failed tool calls like '## Tool: Create' and later retries before succeeding.

summary: Review failed: CacheManager has correctness gaps for duplicate-name incremental invalidation, and Repository Protocol is not a complete match for the current AppState API the mission architecture depends on. Report written for scrutiny triage.
